overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza with neon signage, ascending stairs to an elevated walkway with panoramic city views. The scene features dense crowds of NPCs, modern glass architecture, and vibrant neon lighting mixed with natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with outdoor dining and neon kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling plaza past outdoor seating areas and neon-lit food stalls

notable_agents.action: sitting at the neon-lit outdoor bar with a glowing green drink

entered.detail: outdoor food stall with glowing purple neon trim and illuminated menu displays
hexagonal tile pattern covering the plaza ground with reflective wet surface
large mature tree with dense green foliage in a raised planter box
massive red diagonal structural beam crossing between buildings
tall building with reflective glass facade and multiple illuminated floors
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
tables and chairs with patrons sitting along the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, open pedestrian plaza with hexagonal tile pavement. A neon-lit food kiosk with purple lighting sits on the right, where an NPC sits at the outdoor bar. The camera walks forward toward a large central tree, with a massive red diagonal architectural beam visible in the distance between modern glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete staircase connecting lower and upper plaza levels

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase with red side walls
enters the shadow of the overhead concrete canopy while continuing upward

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs toward the upper plaza level, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs ahead of the camera wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: wide staircase with concrete steps and reddish-brown side walls
metal handrail along the right side of the staircase
concrete overhead structure covering the upper stair landing

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open plaza to a wide concrete staircase with red side walls, beginning the ascent to the upper level. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to mixed shade as the camera enters the shadow of an overhead concrete canopy. Other pedestrians are seen walking up and down the stairs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper covered plaza with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: exits staircase into the covered upper plaza area with concrete pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza level past various pedestrians and digital displays, approaching the elevated edge

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walking surface of the upper plaza level
palm trees planted in large rectangular planters along the walkway
metal safety railing overlooking the lower plaza level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the camera enters a semi-covered upper plaza with smooth concrete pavement and palm trees in planters. The area features digital billboards and scattered pedestrians walking in various directions. The safety railing along the right side provides the first views of the lower level, while the overhead concrete canopy provides partial shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city overlook

events.description: reaches the elevated railing and begins overlooking the lower city streets and plaza
slows to observe the cityscape while walking along the elevated path past sitting NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, looking down at the bustling city streets and plaza below, passing NPCs resting on benches

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: panoramic view of the lower plaza, streets, and surrounding buildings from the elevated perspective
tall cylindrical glass tower with large 03 signage illuminated on the facade
concrete bench with an NPC sitting and looking at a device

segments.scene_description: The final segment features walking along an elevated walkway with the safety railing now on the left, providing expansive views of the city below. The camera overlooks the lower plaza from above, with the distinctive cylindrical tower marked 03 visible in the distance. An NPC sits on a park bench on the right, and the scene opens up to full sunlight with clear views of the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, ground-level pedestrian plaza up to an elevated walkway with expansive city views. It begins by moving across hexagonal tile pavement past a purple neon-lit food kiosk and toward a central tree, with a massive red architectural beam framing the distant skyscrapers. As the camera reaches the edge of the plaza, it transitions onto a wide concrete staircase with red side walls, moving from bright sunlight into the cool shade of an overhead canopy. The scene then opens into a semi-covered upper plaza filled with palm trees and digital billboards before shifting toward an elevated walkway. Finally, the camera moves along a safety railing into full sunlight, overlooking the lower plaza and a distant cylindrical tower marked 03 against the futuristic cityscape.
